title: WCL Examination
subtitle: Computer-Based Test
venueAddress: Ramdeo Tekdi, Gittikhadan, Katol Road, Nagpur, Maharashtra 440013
markingScheme: +1 for correct, -0.5 for wrong, no partial marking
instructions: Carry your Printed Hall Ticket, WCL Employee ID Card and Aadhaar Card.
Report to the examination venue as per the prescribed schedule. Late entry after gate closure will not be permitted.
Your responses are auto-saved. The server time shall be treated as final.
Do not switch tabs, minimize the window, or exit full-screen mode. Three (3) such violations will result in automatic logout from the examination.
Mobile phones (in Flight Mode), smart watches, calculators, books, notes, and all electronic/reference materials are strictly prohibited.

Mobile phones, if carried, shall be switched to Flight Mode, placed in the designated security pouch kept on the candidate's desk, and the candidate will write their name on the label/sticker provided. The pouches will be collected before the commencement of the examination and the same pouches will be returned to the respective candidates in the examination hall after the examination by WCL officials.
Strictly follow the instructions of the Invigilators and Examination Officials.
Maintain the highest standards of integrity, discipline, and professional conduct throughout the examination.
All candidates shall remain governed by the applicable Conduct, Discipline & Appeal (CDA) Rules of Coal India Limited and other rules/instructions of WCL throughout the examination process.
Use of unfair means, impersonation, or any misconduct will invite disciplinary action, including disqualification from the examination.
Earlier submissions will get higher weightage in case of a tie.
